value.stringValue: ACTION REQUIRED - New National Account Rates Request Submitted
Your request has been submitted successfully

choices.name: Add_Weekend_Split_Rates
choices.choiceText: Add Weekend Split Rates (Different rates for Saturday and Sunday)

value.stringValue: Add Weekend Split Rates (Different rates for Saturday and Sunday)

fields.name: Title
fields.fieldText: Please select rates to add. Note that Pay to Charge Ratios must match.

fields.name: Add_overtime_rates_for_this_standard_rate
fields.fieldText: Add overtime rates for this standard rate

fields.name: Add_AWR_rates_for_this_standard_rate
fields.fieldText: Add AWR rates for this standard rate

fields.name: Add_night_rates_for_this_standard_rate
fields.fieldText: Add night rates for this standard rate

validationRule.errorMessage: When selecting Night rates, ensure both Start/End Hour for both day and night rates are populated.

fields.name: Night_Rates_Start_End_Hour
fields.helpText: e.g. 22:00-09:00

fields.name: Do_you_need_to_Add_Weekend_Rates_or_Weekend_Split_Rates
fields.fieldText: Do you need to Add Weekend Rates or Weekend Split Rates?

fields.name: Add_overtime_rates_for_this_weekend_rate
fields.fieldText: Add overtime rates for this weekend rate

fields.name: Add_AWR_rates_for_this_weekend_rate
fields.fieldText: Add AWR rates for this weekend rate

fields.name: Add_night_rates_for_this_weekend_rate
fields.fieldText: Add night rates for this weekend rate

fields.name: Night_Rates_Start_End_Hour_Weekend
fields.helpText: e.g. 22:00-09:00

fields.name: Add_overtime_rates_for_this_weekend_split_rate
fields.fieldText: Add overtime rates for this weekend split rate

fields.name: Add_AWR_rates_for_this_weekend_split_rate
fields.fieldText: Add AWR rates for this weekend split rate

fields.name: Add_night_rates_for_this_weekend_split_rate
fields.fieldText: Add night rates for this weekend split rate

fields.name: Night_Rates_Start_End_Hour_Saturday
fields.helpText: e.g. 22:00-09:00

fields.name: Night_Rates_Start_End_Hour_Sunday
fields.helpText: e.g. 22:00-09:00

fields.name: Add_overtime_rates_for_this_bank_holiday_rate
fields.fieldText: Add overtime rates for this bank holiday rate

fields.name: Add_AWR_rates_for_this_bank_holiday_rate
fields.fieldText: Add AWR rates for this bank holiday rate

fields.name: Add_night_rates_for_this_bank_holiday_rate
fields.fieldText: Add night rates for this bank holiday rate

fields.name: Bank_Holiday_Night_time_Pay_Rate
fields.fieldText: Bank Holiday Night time Pay Rate

fields.name: Bank_Holiday_Night_time_Charge_Rate
fields.fieldText: Bank Holiday Night time Charge Rate

fields.name: Night_Rates_Start_End_Hour_bank_holiday
fields.helpText: e.g. 22:00-09:00

validationRule.formulaExpression: ( TEXT(VALUE(LEFT({!Start_End_Hour_Bank_Holiday}, FIND("-", {!Start_End_Hour_Bank_Holiday}) - 1))) < TEXT(VALUE(MID({!Night_Rates_Start_End_Hour_bank_holiday}, FIND("-", {!Night_Rates_Start_End_Hour_bank_holiday}) + 1, LEN({!Night_Rates_Start_End_Hour_bank_holiday})))) && TEXT(VALUE(MID({!Start_End_Hour_Bank_Holiday}, FIND("-", {!Start_End_Hour_Bank_Holiday}) + 1, LEN({!Start_End_Hour_Bank_Holiday})))) > TEXT(VALUE(LEFT({!Night_Rates_Start_End_Hour_bank_holiday}, FIND("-", {!Night_Rates_Start_End_Hour_bank_holiday}) - 1))) ) || ( TEXT(VALUE(LEFT({!Night_Rates_Start_End_Hour_bank_holiday}, FIND("-", {!Night_Rates_Start_End_Hour_bank_holiday}) - 1))) < TEXT(VALUE(MID({!Start_End_Hour_Bank_Holiday}, FIND("-", {!Start_End_Hour_Bank_Holiday}) + 1, LEN({!Start_End_Hour_Bank_Holiday})))) && TEXT(VALUE(MID({!Night_Rates_Start_End_Hour_bank_holiday}, FIND("-", {!Night_Rates_Start_End_Hour_bank_holiday}) + 1, LEN({!Night_Rates_Start_End_Hour_bank_holiday})))) > TEXT(VALUE(LEFT({!Start_End_Hour_Bank_Holiday}, FIND("-", {!Start_End_Hour_Bank_Holiday}) - 1))) )

fields.name: Title_1
fields.fieldText:
Upload proof of rates

If you are providing rates which are not in line with the rate calculator/card you will need to provide an email from the National Account Manager confirming that these rates can be applied.

fields.name: Title_1_0
fields.fieldText:
Upload proof of rates

If you are providing rates which are not in line with the rate calculator/card you will need to provide an email from the National Account Manager confirming that these rates can be applied.

fields.name: Title_1_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Upload proof of rates

If you are providing rates which are not in line with the rate calculator/card you will need to provide an email from the National Account Manager confirming that these rates can be applied.

textTemplates.name: Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
New national account rates request received. Click on the link below to review and approve the request.

https://blue-arrow.lightning.force.com/{!Create_Staging_Record_0}{!Create_Staging_Record_0_0}{!Create_Staging_Record_0_0_0}
